Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurs out of all cases in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences across all process executions
Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting EIC Decision as a step in the process flow
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting EIC Decision is directly preceded by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that originate from an initial SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision events that occur after at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences to total occurrences of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Number of distinct cases in which SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appears more than once
Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include multiple rounds of revision (e.g., containing both RW-Initial Reviewer Selection and RSW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are part of a variant with performance duration above the median case duration
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision events that occur without any prior SW-Reviewer Agreed activity in the same case
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not occur

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision steps that lead to a final decision (SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, or SW-EIC Minor Revision) within 30 days
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Accept' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject' or activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision'"}"
